title: Chapter 256
content:
Chapter 256: Chapter 256 : The Royal Dish

After Ava left, both Jax and Celestine were alone in his mansion.

And it was awkward. The kind of awkward where neither person knows where to look, what to say, or how to address the elephant in the room that was still dripping from the carriage ride.

Jax broke the silence first. "Seems like Jennifer has taken a liking to Ava."

Celestine sat on a chair with her legs crossed. Her cold demeanor intact despite the blush she had been fighting for the past hour. "I don’t know. Maybe she’s using Ava and that poor idiot is trailing behind her like a dog."

Jax sat on the edge of the bed. "I don’t think so. Jennifer sure has a business mind and she only seeks profit. But I know her better than that. She’s someone who treats her people with genuine care and respect. She has the kind of mindset that makes her grow along with everyone around her."

He paused. "And trust me, the people around her are crazy for her. They would die for her without a second thought."

"You really think highly of her."

Jax Replied, "Because I’ve experienced it firsthand. So the case here is probably that she genuinely likes Ava. And knowing Ava’s nature, she’s sticking around to secure some profit. Probably setting up her future by becoming the apprentice of one of the top businesswomen."

Celestine nodded. "That makes sense. That bitch follows her orders like a dog. And even now she wouldn’t have left us willingly, seeing how she was acting around you."

A small smile crept onto her face. "She looked happy about having a fair fight. But I know she’s cursing right now."

Jax raised an eyebrow. "Fight? What do you mean?"

"Obviously. The fight for you."

Jax stared at her. "What the hell. You girls are really fixated on the same childish obsession even here?"

Her cold eyes didn’t waver. "That’s not some obsession or tantrum. Maybe it is for Ava. But for me, my heart tells me I want you by my side. Always. As my husband when I rule my kingdom."

She uncrossed her legs and crossed them again.

"And for that I can go to any length. So you better prepare for it."

Jax leaned back. "And that’s exactly what obsession is."

The realization hit her. He could see it flash across her eyes. But she didn’t lose her composure. Didn’t crack her cold exterior.

Jax knew he was in deep trouble with these two yanderes. Ava was chaotic and menacing but manageable. The real threat would surface when she learned he already belonged to other women.

And then there was Celestine. Who wanted him for no logical reason that he could identify. Just raw, stubborn, royal determination aimed directly at his life.

He sighed. "Didn’t you say you wanted to not lose to Ava? And if I’m correct, you’re thinking of winning me over with the same act. That’s why you asked for the same reward she wanted?"

She twitched.

"You don’t have to force yourself," Jax said. "It’s not like I’m some lusty beast who’ll hate you just because Ava and I had sex."

"I know. But..."

"No. I only want this. I want the whole night with you. So give me this. Treat me like her. No, better than her."

"You know how cute you looked just now? Showing all that resolve only to make that regretful face a moment later."

His hand rested on her cheek.

"So you really want to continue from here? Because let me warn you. I don’t spare anyone when it comes to this. Don’t expect gentleness or kindness in bed."

She nodded. But the nod told everything. How terrified she was. How clueless. And why wouldn’t she be? This was her first time.
